text.title: Google Ads Reporting and Optimization Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pull-reports
step.action: Pull Overview, Campaigns, Keywords, Search Terms, Auction Insights with the 11-column preset.

step.name: segment
step.action: Add device, network, location, time, audience segment columns; compute per-segment deltas vs campaign average.
step.decision-gate: If under 3 segments have over 100 conversions, fall back to campaign aggregate plus a low-data warning.

step.name: diagnose
step.action: For each metric deviation over 15 pct, apply the symptom-to-cause map.
step.output: Diagnosis table: metric / segment / cause / lever.

step.name: prioritize
step.action: Rank actions by spend × deviation × confidence; cut at top-5.

step.name: schedule
step.action: Assign owner + stable-data window. Major changes flagged for the monthly slot.
step.decision-gate: If any single action would change bids by over 25 pct, route to weekly review, not auto-apply.
